steps.title: Identify the subject's number
steps.content: The subject is The African Games Co-production Market (singular). The phrase one of over 180 annual international conferences supporting video game development is a descriptive element in commas and doesn't change the subject's number.

steps.title: Apply the subject-verb agreement rule
steps.content: Promotes is the only singular verb form that agrees with the singular subject. All other choices are plural forms and violate the agreement rule. That matches choice C — C is correct.
